Class.name: BarricadeNode
Class.description: This is a generic barricade node.

Class.name: Builder
Class.description: NPC that can build barricades at interaction nodes.

Class.name: Player
Class.description: Class used by the local player.

State.name: Exploded
State.description: The smart object has already exploded.

State.name: HasAmmo
State.description: This prop will provide ammo when searched

State.name: HasFood
State.description: This prop will provide food when searched

State.name: HasMeds
State.description: This prop will provide meds when searched

State.name: HasMission
State.description: This prop will launch a mission when searched

State.name: HasStim
State.description: This prop will provide stim when searched

State.name: Idle
State.description: This state is used to mark objects as idle.
